summary: Completed testing of Stripe checkout subscription mode, email/password authentication, and insights endpoint. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend web app loading properly.

integration_issues.issue: After email registration on /api/web, redirects to root URL (/) which shows Expo mobile app instead of web app dashboard at /api/web

action_items: Consider redirecting web app registration to /api/web instead of / for better UX
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ server.py (lines 838-897): Stripe checkout correctly uses stripe.checkout.Session.create() with mode='subscription' for recurring prices
✅ server.py (lines 668-715): Email/password login returns proper responses with user_id, email, name
✅ server.py (lines 595-666): Email/password registration creates user with 7-day premium trial, returns proper response
✅ server.py (lines 2306-2318): production_text correctly shows 'Inga ägg registrerade än' when total_eggs=0
✅ Login.tsx: Email auth form with login/register toggle working correctly
✅ Dashboard.tsx: Shows quick actions, stats, AI-insikter section

success_rate.frontend: 95% (web app loads, auth flows work, minor redirect issue)

test_credentials.note: New users get 7-day premium trial automatically

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during API testing (can be cleaned up from MongoDB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified working. Stripe checkout returns valid checkout.stripe.com URLs for both monthly and yearly plans. Email/password auth (register + login) working correctly. Insights endpoint shows 'Inga ägg registrerade än' for users with 0 eggs (premium users only see this section). Web app at /api/web loads correctly. Test file test_stripe_and_auth.py can be used for regression testing.

details.new_user: Returns 200 with user_id, email, 7-day trial message

details.new_user_0_eggs: Shows 'Inga ägg registrerade än' with status 'no_data'
details.note: Premium section only visible for premium users (new users have 7-day trial)

details.login_page: Shows Hönsgården branding, Google login, email login buttons
details.registration_form: Shows name, email, password fields with '7 dagars gratis Premium ingår!'
details.cookie_banner: Cookie consent banner present and functional
